name: at
description: Schedule /at and /defer prompts locally in the current chat thread, inspect quota with /quota, and stop queued prompts.

interface.longDescription: Plan a prompt for a future timestamp with /at, or defer until quota is free with /defer. Inspect local quota snapshot parsing with /quota. Stop pending scheduled prompts with /at stop. All commands run via local hook scheduling in this thread without immediate model execution.
defaultPrompt: /at in 20 minutes | Erinnere mich an das Deployment.
/defer | Starte den Prompt, sobald das Kontingent wieder frei ist.
